svg.title: TriSwitch Component Mockup
svg.desc: SUPERSEDED — Violet-600 accent colors in track/thumb. DS §16 FLAG-005. Do not use as a build target. See DS §16 FLAG-005. Component: TriSwitch Page: Tools sidebar panel (ToolRow), chat page ToolsSidebar Design system version: 2.0 (2026-03-08) Artboards: component-focused 800×600px (desktop only; no separate mobile artboard — TriSwitch is identical at all breakpoints)

g.text: Search the web for current information

svg.text: ARIA: role="slider" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="2" aria-valuenow="{position}" aria-valuetext="{label}" aria-label="{toolName} status"
Active (pressed): thumb scale-90 (instant, no transition). Keyboard: ArrowRight/Up = advance; ArrowLeft/Down = retreat. Mobile: no layout change; 44px touch target applies at all breakpoints.
